mapper.select: SELECT u.id AS userId, u.nickname AS customerName, DATEDIFF(NOW(), MAX(o.create_time)) AS rDays, COUNT(o.id) AS fCount, SUM(o.pay_amount) AS mAmount FROM mo_order o LEFT JOIN mo_user u ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.status IN ('PAID', 'SHIPPED', 'COMPLETED') AND o.delete_status = 0 GROUP BY o.user_id, u.id, u.nickname ORDER BY mAmount DESC LIMIT 50
